title: Organigram Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2024 Results
text: Organigram Reports Fourth Quarter and Fiscal 2024 Results. Press Release: Business Wire published the official earnings announcement for OGI's Q4 2024 results. Timing: The announcement was made on December 18, 2024, with results for the fiscal year ending September 30, 2024. Financial Summary: The press release detailed OGI's full-year fiscal 2024 performance and fourth quarter results. Strategic Initiatives: The announcement highlighted strategic initiatives and operational improvements undertaken during fiscal 2024. Forward Guidance: Management provided forward-looking statements regarding fiscal 2025 expectations. Capital Allocation: Information regarding capital expenditures and allocation of resources was included. Production Metrics: Updated production volumes and efficiency metrics for the full year were disclosed. Market Position: The company's competitive position in the Canadian cannabis market was emphasized. International Operations: The company's international expansion efforts were discussed.
